'''Arikakon Baraka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] from [[Dac/Legends|Dac]] who served in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
Arikakon Baraka, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], was born on his [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. Baraka came from a long line of military men, as his father and his father's father had been [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]; indeed, Baraka had been chosen to become a professional soldier from birth. BY [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he had won scars and experience in over one hundred regional conflicts.

===Service to the Republic===
By the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy-spanning]] conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Baraka had attained the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] within the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]]. During the first [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the war, he was given command of a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] training program on the watery [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Vandor-3]], operating out of the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] [[Nexu (starship)|''Nexu'']]. Baraka discovered that he greatly disliked the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]], and saw their mass-production and utter similarity as the end of the Republic's great military traditions. Overseeing fifty thousand clones, including [[Jangotat|Alpha-98]], Baraka subjected them to a brutal—and sometimes lethal—training regimen.

====Mission to Ord Cestus====
In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Baraka was dispatched to [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] and positioned the ''Nexu'' in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] over the planet. On the surface, a [[Mission to Ord Cestus|mission]] to destroy a [[JK-13 security droid|new type of droid]] was well underway, led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]]. Along with a local [[Desert Wind|rebel group]] fighting against the [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]], the Separatist-aligned rulers of Ord Cestus. Alpha-98, who had previously been sent to Ord Cestus after his successes on Vandor-3, accompanied the Jedi as well.

Soon, Kenobi and Fisto left on a mission to sabotage the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory, attempting to avoid an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] by Baraka's vessel. If the Jedi were unable to pinpoint the factory's location, the entire city of [[ChikatLik]] would be leveled by the ''Nexu'', to make certain that the "Jedi Killer droids" would not survive. While the Jedi were away, Alpha-98 discovered where the Five Families were hiding, and slipped away from his fellow clones in order to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] the leaders. After encountering heavy resistance, the forces on the ground ordered Baraka to begin the orbital strike, an action which would cost the lives of millions of innocent beings. At the same time, Alpha-98 discovered that though he had indeed found the Separatist leaders, he could not gain access to them; instead, he transmitted a targeting code into orbit, calling the strike upon his own location.

On board the ''Nexu'', a [[CT-9/85|clone technician]] brought the transmission to Baraka's attention. The admiral joined the clone at his station as the technician managed to decode the signal, which changed the coordinates to a location near [[Kibo Lake]]. Baraka briefly checked the veracity of the location, then commanded his vessel to commence the strike. In moments, the entire facility was wiped out, killing everyone within, including the Five Families and Alpha-98. Soon after, Kenobi and Fisto managed to end the threat of the Jedi Killer droids as well.

*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
